title: Witaj'Swords
description: |1.21.1-1.21.3|This mod adds 3d weapons to Minecraft made of skint and chlorophyte.
body:
## **This mod adds new weapons in the Minecraft. All weapons are balanced and fit perfectly into the vanilla.**
![all weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed682dde443cb42f27117f113e0f53ec2da179cc.png)


**The mod also adds new ores to the game:** skint and chlorophyte. The first one you can find in a regular cave, from it you can craft a **skint converter**, which will help you create weapons from the most unusual materials. The skin is also used to repair weapons.
![skint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c09c8e47601f04941a22634a21fc07e8c8a25747_0.webp)


The second can only be found in lush caves and only at altitudes above zero. **Chlorophyte** can be used to craft weapons and tools. 
![chlorophyte](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75804c09d737999622939a9d9c1996d7cd872643.png)

In the caves in the chests you can find different ingots and materials for the sword.

**Also in the mod there are a large number of other weapons such as:**
- Bone sword
- Amethyst sword
- Ender sword
- Rusty sword
- Glided sword
- and others.
